ideation: This sequence aims to express the gentle, loving feeling associated with the light blue heart emoji.  The animation will show both arms moving in a soft, embracing motion.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, conveying a sense of warmth and care. The arms will start in a relaxed position, then gently raise and curve inward before returning to a relaxed state.  This will use a combination of joint1 (shoulder roll) and joint2 (shoulder pitch) movements to create the embracing gesture.  Wrist movements will be minimal to maintain a calm and gentle feel.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a gentle beginning
arms slowly lift and curve inward, embracing
arms reach their peak embrace, soft and warm
arms begin to release the gentle hold
arms return to rest, a loving stillness
